layerDefinitions.event-item: 规范化 Runtime Event / Thread / Turn / Item 事件项
layerDefinitions.projection-oracle: Projection / ReadModel / ContentPart / render snapshot oracle
layerDefinitions.gui-electron: 真实 Electron Desktop Host + App Server fixture evidence
layerDefinitions.governance-guard: 禁止 legacy / mock / natural-language lifecycle 回流的守卫

current: Runtime Event -> Thread / Turn / Item materialization
compat: 无 itemId / phase / sequence 的 legacy delta 只允许 fail-closed
历史 Message.content hydrate 兜底不作为新证据
deprecated: timeline 二次重建完整过程流
overlay 全局助手文本缓冲

executionBatches.skeletonExit: P0 场景都有 event/projection/GUI 目标层、legacy 清理目标和下一步细节入口；细节优先只补阻塞首字、reasoning、terminal、inputbar 的缺口。
Thread/read/list/resume/fork/rollback/archive/settings/token/compaction/goal 场景都有 hydrate 和 replay oracle 入口；细节按 read model 同构优先。
Command/FileChange/approval/permission/network/guardian/hook 场景都有 item taxonomy、owner linkage 和 hydrate 入口；细节按 approval 与 patch 互斥 owner 优先。
MCP structured/resource/elicitation/inventory/thread-scope/startup 场景都有 server/thread/capability scope 与 GUI oracle 入口；细节按 resource 和 elicitation 优先。
Skills/catalog/mention/capability/plugin/expert 场景都有 search/read/gate/invoke 和 scope hydrate 入口；细节按 skill mention restore 与 capability stack 优先。
Multi-Agent/review 场景都有 parent-child lineage、tool schema、visual snapshot 和 review turn owner 入口；细节按 tool schema 和 visual baseline 优先。

executionBatches.family: Image / Web / Dynamic Tools / Structured Output / Realtime
executionBatches.skeletonExit: Image/web/dynamic/structured/realtime 场景都有 typed payload、media refs、provider/tool namespace 和 not-current guard 入口；细节按 image input restore 与 structured output 优先。
Markdown/diff/resize/live-tail/history/status/right-surface 场景都有 screenshot/snapshot、layout anchor 和 render owner 入口；细节按 visual baseline 优先。

scenarios.nextDetail: 补 startup/prewarm 专项 Electron fixture，覆盖 prewarm late update 和 abort 等边界。
回补 raw reasoning hydrate / duplicate guard 的 item-level oracle，并删除仍按展示文案识别 reasoning lifecycle 的旧 helper。
已由 default complete Electron fixture 覆盖 message.delta + message.completed full snapshot + turn.completed 顺序、GUI assistant scope 去重和 read model 去重；后续细节并入 live tail / process boundary richer fixture。

Projection oracle、Plan owner / decision drawer / history hydrate Electron 正向 oracle，以及无 proposed_plan 不生成 Plan UI 的 Electron 负向 owner oracle 均已覆盖；local decision guard 已阻止无 revision / legacy update_plan revision 生成实施确认。

已补 failed-after-answer 与 canceled-after-answer Electron current fixture；completion plan 命名与 fixture terminal summary 已改回 current turn_completed/turn.completed 口径，不再把 legacy final_done 算作 current 成功终态；下一步补真实旧 terminal owner 投影细节，并确认 final_done / grace timer 旧路径没有其它生产入口。

packaged rich restore、multi queue、pop-front resume hydrate 与 GUI 一键 product promote/cancel/resume 已补；inputbar-pending-steer fixture 已拆成 scenario facade、GUI action helper 与 read-model helper；EmptyStateComposerPanel text-only restore fallback、AgentChatWorkspace 父级 text/path-only 预恢复 fallback、stop restore 的 getSessionReadModel optional runtime fallback、stop restore queued draft 本地队列裁剪、explicit remove/promote 本地队列裁剪、submit failure 与 terminal side-effect 本地队列删除、queue event 本地 position 重排、Hook 内联 queued turn projection helper 已删除并加 source guard；queue / steer / draft 生产写入口 inventory 已由 current owner 白名单守住。

inputbar-pending-steer-pop-front-resume packaged Gate B 与 product-current GUI 一键 promote/cancel/resume 已通过；fixture 已拆成 scenario facade、GUI action helper 与 read-model helper；stop restore 的 getSessionReadModel optional runtime fallback、stop restore queued draft 本地队列裁剪、explicit remove/promote 本地队列裁剪、submit failure 与 terminal side-effect 本地队列删除、queue event 本地 position 重排、Hook 内联 queued turn projection helper 已删除并加 source guard；后续 queue / steer / draft 旧 fallback inventory 并入 inputbar-restore-matrix 细节清理。
Electron stop helper 已要求可见 assistant 输出与 running status 同屏后再点击；下一步补 stale terminal projection oracle，避免只靠 Electron happy path。
已补 terminal-stale-guard Electron current 骨架；下一步把旧 terminal owner 投影扩到真实 event 注入后再删除无 turnId terminal fallback。
cancel/cancel-then-continue stop 前已要求可见 assistant 输出与 running status 同屏，避免首字前 loading 误作证据；下一步补 status item owner / stale terminal projection oracle，确保 completed 后只清 running 不删输出。
P0 已收口：lifecycle/projection/parser current owner 已扩面扫描，文本派生 status source 只能停留在负向检测 owner；后续新增 lifecycle owner 必须同步进入 guard。

已补 package-side Codex thread read/list/resume page isomorphic projection guard、App Server read model hydrate regression 与 Electron session history fixture；覆盖 read/list/resume 同 thread、turn/item order、page cursor、history hydrate DOM 同构、禁止 startup note 与 forbidden turn/start。下一步回头补 archived read/forked_from/failed idle flag 细节。

已补 package-side Codex running resume projection guard，覆盖 active turn/live stream binding、NotLoaded fail closed、history override fail closed、override model/cwd 不污染 running thread、shadow session fail closed；下一步补 App Server resume/read model 与 Electron running stream oracle。

已补 package-side Codex thread/inject_items projection guard，覆盖 raw response item insertion order、turn linkage、metadata preservation、previous/next model input boundary、remote image URL fail closed、hydrate 不得变成 user input 或 assistant final tail；下一步补 App Server read model item 与 Electron hydrate oracle。

已补 package-side Codex thread/status/changed runtime projection guard，覆盖 Active -> Idle/SystemError/NotLoaded runtime update、optOutNotificationMethods、waiting active flags、transcript/read-model item leak fail closed、status surface thread scope 与 DOM text inference fail closed；下一步补 App Server read model/status surface 与 Electron header/sidebar oracle。

已补 package-side Codex thread/fork lineage projection guard，覆盖 forkedFromId、lastTurnId terminal prefix、parent item ids、thread/read 同构、sidebar/history/evidence lineage、source rollout unchanged、parentThreadId 误用与 plain thread render fail closed；下一步补 App Server lineage read model 与 Electron sidebar/history/evidence oracle。

已补 package-side Codex thread rollback projection guard，覆盖 ThreadRolledBack marker、removed turn 不再投影、resume/read model/history window 清理、累计 marker replay、settings/reference context/token usage 重算、turn in progress/numTurns=0/UI-only hide fail closed；下一步补 App Server rollback read model 与 Electron history oracle。

已补 package-side Codex archive/unarchive/delete hydrate projection guard，覆盖 archive notification、archived read by id、active/archived list consistency、unarchive restore、delete descendant notifications、deleted read/resume fail closed、item fingerprint stable、path state consistency、sidebar-only archive fail closed；下一步补 App Server metadata/read model 与 Electron sidebar/list/read/restore oracle。

已补 package-side Codex thread/settings/updated live projection guard，覆盖 settings-only update 不启动模型请求、active turn settings 不被污染、future turn 使用 updated model/serviceTier/cwd、ack 不直接改 cached session、notification 才更新 cache、transcript/read-model item leak、service tier clear、sandboxPolicy+permissions fail closed 与 turn/start override notification；下一步补 App Server read model/settings surface 与 Electron model/cwd/header/sidebar oracle。

已补 package-side Codex token usage replay projection guard，覆盖 resume/fork restored thread/tokenUsage/updated、excludeTurns skip、replay before next turn、turn attribution、rebuilt turn position/stale interrupted tail fail closed、connection-scoped replay、total/last/modelContextWindow、context-window surface update 与 transcript/read-model item leak fail closed；下一步补 App Server resume/fork read model 与 Electron status line/header/context-window oracle。

已补 package-side Codex contextCompaction item projection guard，覆盖 item/started + item/completed 同 id lifecycle、deprecated thread/compacted 不能替代 current item、replacement history verbatim、old item fingerprint stable、read model / follow-up model input 保留 compaction item、thread/compact/start empty ack；下一步补 App Server compaction read model 与 Electron history hydrate/status oracle。

已补 package-side Codex goal lifecycle hydrate projection guard，覆盖 goal status/budget/usage hydrate、blocked/usageLimited wire status 映射、objective edit 不重置 usage、clear 后 read=null、header/footer/goal surface 结构化 owner、analytics 不泄漏 objective/token_budget，以及 transcript/read-model item leak fail closed；下一步补 App Server objective/read model facade 与 Electron footer/header/status DOM oracle。
已补 CommandExecution -> exec_command 转换层 shell wrapper 隐藏 guard；下一步补 working/completed/failed hydrate 与 Electron command lifecycle oracle。
已补 patch timeline item -> file_changes_batch projection guard，保留 diff/provenance 并压掉同路径 artifact；下一步建立独立 FileChange event item 与 Electron artifact/approval oracle。

已补 Electron current fixture：pending approval hydrate 后 GUI 可操作，点击允许走 agentSession/action/respond，同一 turn 继续 action.resolved -> tool.result -> message.delta -> turn.completed；下一步细分 network approval、sandbox denial 与 patch approval oracle。

已补 action.required live parser、App Server event projection 与 history approval_request hydrate 的 permission_facts + thread/turn scope guard；下一步补真实 request permission grant / environment 隔离与 Electron approval oracle。

已补 action.required live parser、App Server event projection 与 history approval_request hydrate 的 network_approval host/protocol/port/environment/owner/proposed-amendment guard；下一步补真实 Electron allow once/session/deny lifecycle oracle。

已补 action.required live parser、App Server event projection 与 history approval_request hydrate 的 guardian_review review/status/action guard；下一步补独立 guardian lifecycle item、parallel aggregate status 与 Electron denied/timedOut oracle。

已补 Codex hook.started/completed 与 workflow.hook.started/completed 到独立 hook item 的 live parser、App Server event projection 与 history converter guard；下一步补 parallel quiet hooks collapse、completed output before assistant message DOM 与 Electron lifecycle oracle。
补 large result truncation 和 structured/null fallback 细节 oracle。

已补 package-side Codex MCP resource tool contract 与 read snapshot projection guard，保留 server/uri/mime/content preview/truncation/thread scope/evidence refs，并禁止 string-only ordinary tool output；下一步补 App Server read model surface 与 Electron resource/evidence panel oracle。

已补 package-side Codex MCP elicitation request/resolution projection guard，绑定 requestId/server/thread/turn/form schema/client OpenAI form capability，并让 unsupported capability / accept-without-content fail closed；下一步补 App Server serverRequest/read model 与 Electron 表单提交后继续 tool call oracle。

已补 package-side Codex mcpServerStatus/list projection guard，保留 raw server/tool name、sanitized collision group、thread scope、auth-only detail，并禁止 naked server__tool 与 toolsAndAuthOnly 加载 resources；下一步补 App Server inventory read model 与 Electron inventory/status panel oracle。

已补 package-side Codex selected executor/plugin MCP thread scope projection guard，保留 selected root、plugin server owner、thread inventory、tool call 和 OAuth notification scope，并让全局/跨 thread 泄漏 fail closed；下一步补 App Server inventory read model 与 Electron thread 切换 oracle。

已补 package-side Codex MCP startup status projection guard，保留 mcp_startup_update/complete 的 thread scope、server/status/error/failureReason、runtime header、active turn running 共存、other-thread ignore、stale update fail-closed 和禁止 assistant item；下一步补 App Server notification/read model 与 Electron header/warning oracle。
补 search/read/gate/invoke item-level provenance oracle。

已补 package-side Codex skills catalog scope projection guard，覆盖环境关闭跳过 cwd roots、requested cwd 顺序、extra roots 与 runtime request roots 同步、cache generation 和全局 cache 污染 fail-closed；下一步补 App Server skills list/read model 与 Electron workspace/cwd 切换 oracle。

补 contract guard，证明 expert skillRefs 仍走 search/gate。

补 parent/child lineage 的 item-level hydrate guard。
已建立 Codex v2 Team tool schema / legacy field reject / interrupted status projection guard；下一步迁 Rust runtime surface 并补 Electron schema error UI oracle。
已建立 collabToolCall item-derived Team transcript / roster / delegation graph / worker notification snapshot guard；下一步补 App Server read model 与 Electron DOM/截图 oracle。
已建立 review/start entered/exitedReviewMode、inline/detached thread、approval item id 和 prompt/final transcript leak guard；下一步补 App Server read model 与 Electron review lane oracle。

scenarios.family: Image / Web / Dynamic Tools / Structured Output / Realtime
scenarios.nextDetail: 已有 package-side guard 覆盖 dynamic/extension tool namespace、deferred inventory、arguments、structured content item、remote image failure 与裸工具名 fail-closed；仍缺 App Server read model 与 Electron tool UI oracle。

scenarios.family: Image / Web / Dynamic Tools / Structured Output / Realtime
scenarios.nextDetail: 已有 package-side guard 覆盖 output_schema request format/per-turn scope、assistant typed payload、copy/export 结构保留、function/custom output 类型、content_items 与 structuredContent 不文本化；仍缺 App Server read model 与 Electron JSON/table/card renderer oracle。

scenarios.family: Image / Web / Dynamic Tools / Structured Output / Realtime
scenarios.nextDetail: 已有 package-side not-current/current contract guard：未声明 current owner 时 realtime event 不得进入 transcript/tool；启用时必须证明 thread-scoped started/closed、item/transcript/audio 投影、append-only text input 与 sideband audio non-blocking。仍缺 App Server/Electron current oracle。

已有 package-side renderer snapshot guard：assistant final text、tool output、artifact preview 必须声明同一 markdown renderer owner，并覆盖 heading/table/file link/code fence/CJK/mixed-width wrap、rich block snapshot、file link path/line metadata；pageText-only、raw markdown table/fence 和 renderer owner 分叉 fail closed。仍缺 Electron screenshot/DOM oracle。

已有 package-side diff artifact guard：artifact/workbench/review 必须共享 structured diff item，fileChanges 覆盖 add/delete/update/rename/multiple files，并保留 line numbers、gutter signs、long-line wrap；raw patch string 与 fake artifact card fail closed。仍缺 Electron diff screenshot/DOM oracle。

已有 package-side resize/reflow guard，并新增 Electron current fixture：复用 live-tail 长输出 current turn，完成后打开 files right surface，采集 wide/compact/restored 三组 viewport DOM 与截图，断言 MessageList tail range anchor、Inputbar bottom row、right surface owner/files root、no-overlap、read model completed 与 backend `turn.completed` 对齐；layout state 写回 item 和 pageText-only layout oracle 继续 fail closed。剩余细节是沉淀更稳定的视觉 baseline diff，并与 markdown/diff/status screenshot oracle 统一。

已有 package-side live tail commit guard，并新增 Electron current fixture：GUI 先捕获 completion 前首字/首 token 与 running 状态，随后验证 overflow commit、长输出、scroll anchor、table tail reflow、read model completed 与 backend ledger current turn.completed。剩余细节是沉淀稳定 screenshot baseline，并与 electron-resize-reflow 合并做 viewport 变化 oracle。

已由 package-side guard + Electron session history fixture 覆盖 App Server current read model 与 GUI history hydrate DOM/screenshot oracle：user textElements、本地/远程图片 refs、reasoning 单次渲染、MCP running owner/tool row 与 forbidden turn/start 均已验证；剩余视觉 baseline diff 统一到 markdown/diff/status snapshot 细节。

已有 package-side status surface matrix guard：footer/header/title/rate limit/model/reasoning/goal/status preview 必须覆盖并绑定同一 session/thread、共享 presentation owner，model/reasoning/goal/title/runtime/rate limit 都带结构化 facts；自然语言状态推断和组件本地重复命名 fail closed。仍缺 Electron header/footer/title/status screenshot/DOM oracle。
沉淀稳定 screenshot baseline，不只检查 rootVisible。
